PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DIAZ,KAREN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RUFINO'S AUTO BODY $3,669.46 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,684.46 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $35.33 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT RUFINO'S AUTO BODY
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT RUFINO'S AUTO BODY
